name: 破舊住所（假裝的）
description: 男女主在看似破舊實則精心佈置的住所約會，場景本身就是「裝窮」主題的具象化。觀眾享受這種雙方都在演戲的喜劇情境。

examples.drama_title: [FULL HD] She Married a Homeless CEO?! | Full Mini Drama HD | Romantic Comedy Series
examples.excerpt: I got these custom made. You can't get them anywhere else in the world. / Making lemonade out of life's lemons. Hats off to you. / It's Syrian style. Rugged and elegant. I had it custom made by professional interior designer.
examples.context: 男女主在看似破舊實則精心佈置的住所約會，場景本身就是「裝窮」主題的具象化。觀眾享受這種雙方都在演戲的喜劇情境。
